zh.Barns, Manor, Peebles-shire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾曼諾
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Burnet於大約1520年出生在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾時，他的父親Thomas Burnett23歲，母親marion inglis43歲。他於大約1539年與Isabel Hay在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾曼諾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1571年享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: Burnet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (central and eastern Scotland): variant of   Burnett  .
French: status name or topographic name from a shortened derivative of   Buron   ‘hut, cottage’.

variants.name: Burnett
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Tyrone and Antrim): descriptive nickname of Norman origin, from Old French burnete, a diminutive of brun ‘brown’ (see Brown ), or possibly in some instances a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of burnete, a high quality woolen cloth, originally dark brown in color.
Probably also an altered form of English   Barnett  .
In some cases also an altered form of French   Burnet  ; compare   Burnette  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Burnet was born about 1520, in Peeblesshire, Scotland, his father, Thomas Burnett, was 23 and his mother, marion inglis, was 43. He married Isabel Hay about 1539, in Manor, Peeblesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1571, at the age of 52.

ko.lifeSummary: William Burnet(이)가 대략 1520년 스컷랜드 피블레실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Burnett(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 marion inglis(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1539년 스컷랜드 피블레실르 먼어에서 Isabel Hay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Burnet родился около 1520 г. в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Thomas Burnett было 23 года, а матери, которую звали marion inglis, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Hay около 1539 г. в местности манор, пиблессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1571 г. в возрасте 52 лет.
